tc.t:
[计] 任务控制, 终端控制, 传输控制
[医] 锝(43号元素)
tc.d:
n a crystalline metallic element not found in nature; occurs as one of the fission products of uranium
n a permanent council of the United Nations that commissions a country (or countries) to undertake the administration of a territory

tcaa.t: abbr. Technical Communication Association of Australia 澳洲技术交流协会; Technical Communications Association of Australia 澳大利亚技术通信协会; Thailand Civil Aviation Administration 泰国民航局; Truck Cap and Accessory Association 卡车司机和副手联盟

tcas.t: abbr. threat alert and collision avoidance system 威胁报警与防撞系统; traffic alert and collision avoidance system 交通报警与防撞系统; The College of Advanced Science 高等科学学院; terminal control address space 终端控制地址空间

tcb.t: [计] 任务控制块, 传送控制块

tcc.t: [计] 技术控制中心, 传输控制字符

tce.t: abbr. 总综合误差（Total Composite Error）；热膨胀系数（Thermal Coefficient of Expansion）；三氯乙烯（Trichloroethylene）
tce.d: n. a heavy colorless highly toxic liquid used as a solvent to clean electronic components and for dry cleaning and as a fumigant; causes cancer and liver and lung damage

tcg.t: abbr. Time Controlled Gain 时间受控增益额度

tch.t: n. 业务信道；总胆固醇；话务信道

tchad.d: n a landlocked desert republic in north-central Africa; was under French control until 1960

tchadienne.t:
乍得的
T～ 乍得人

tchadiennes.t:
(tchadienne 的复数) 乍得的
T～ 乍得人

tchaikovskian.t: a. (俄罗斯作曲家)柴可夫斯基的作品的；柴可夫斯基的音乐风格的

tchaikovsky.t: n. 柴可夫斯基（人名, 俄国作曲家, 1840-1893）
tchaikovsky.d: n. important Russian composer whose works are noted for their expressive melodies (1840-1893)

tchamba.t: [地名] [多哥、刚果民主共和国、喀麦隆、新喀里多尼亚（法）] 昌巴

tcheka.t: n. <俄>契卡("肃反委员会"的俄语缩略语)

tchick.t: n. 催马快跑所发之声

tchotchke.t: n. 廉价小饰物; 小玩意
tchotchke.d:
n. (Yiddish) an attractive, unconventional woman
n. (Yiddish) an inexpensive showy trinket

tci.t: abbr. trip-cancellation insurance 取消旅行保险

tcl.t: [计] 终端命令语言, 终端控制语言

tcms.t: abbr. tactical communications management system 战术通信管理系统; telecommunications management system 电信管理系统

tco.t: abbr. 总体拥有成本（ 	Total Cost of Ownership）；瑞典专业职业联盟；零点温度影响

tcp.t: [计] 终端控制程序, 测试检验程序, 传输控制协议
tcp.d: n a protocol developed for the internet to get data from one network device to another

tcp maximum segment size.t: TCP 最大段值,(PPP模式中常用的名词,它与连线速率有关,一般预设值为1460)

tcp mss.t: PPP模式中名词,与连线速率有关

tcp/ip.t: [计] TCP/IP协议, 传输控制协议/网间协议
tcp/ip.d: n a set of protocols (including TCP) developed for the internet in the 1970s to get data from one network device to another

tcpc.t: abbr. tab card punch control 制表卡片穿孔控制

tcpo.t: abbr. tricetylphosphine oxide 氧化三（个）十六烷基磷

tcq.t: abbr. trellis coded quantization 格状编码量化

tcr.t: abbr. 电阻温度系数（temperature coefficient of resistance）；技术制导雷达（Tactical Control Radar）

tcs.d:
n a crystalline metallic element not found in nature; occurs as one of the fission products of uranium
n a permanent council of the United Nations that commissions a country (or countries) to undertake the administration of a territory

tcsec.t: 可信计算机系统评价准则

tcv.t: abbr. temperature-control valve 温度控制阀

tcvs.t: abbr. Thrust Chamber Valve Switch （火箭发动机）推力室阀门开关

tcw.t: abbr. time code work 时间码运转

tcxture.t: [医] 结构, 构造, 质地; 组织
